sn.s: Ich fühl mich nöd guet, ich bi chrank.
sn.e: I don't feel well, I'm sick.

sn.s: De Hals tuet weh und ich ha Fieber.
sn.e: My throat hurts and I have a fever.

sn.s: Ich rüef de Dokter aa für e Termin.
sn.e: I call the doctor for an appointment.
"Come by right away," the practice says.

sn.s: Bim Dokter frag er: "Was händ Sie?"
sn.e: At the doctor's he asks: "What's wrong?"

sn.s: "De Hals tuet weh und ich ha Fieber."
sn.e: "My throat hurts and I have a fever."

sn.s: Er luegt mer i de Hals und nickt.
sn.e: He looks into my throat and nods.

sn.s: "Ich gib Ihne es Rezäpt für es Medikamänt."
sn.e: "I'll give you a prescription for a medicine."

sn.s: "Trinked viel und ruehed sich us," seit er.
sn.e: "Drink a lot and rest," he says.

sn.s: "Wänn bin ich wider bsser?" frag ich.
sn.e: "When will I be better?" I ask.

sn.s: "I es paar Täg gaht's Ihne wider guet."
sn.e: "In a few days you'll be fine again."

sn.s: Sogar chrank cha ich mich jetz uusdrucke.
sn.e: Even sick I can now express myself.
